author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
EA SPORTS Madden NFL 27 – Official Reveal Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
EA SPORTS Madden NFL 27 is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 on August 13, 2026! Wishlist now: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/ea-sports-madden-nfl-27-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1079-01&utm_id=P1079-01

Powered by the all-new Persona Engine, EA SPORTS Madden NFL 27 features a reactive, always-evolving league, where every NFL athlete has a distinct, realistic personality that informs their motivations, demands, and reactions.  

Gameplay includes more precise control from authentic WR/DB battles, new short-yardage mechanics, defensive coverage improvements, and new strategic pre-play settings and controls.  

Build your NFL legacy on a deeper progression path in the new Superstar G.O.A.T. Career Journey and control your roster with more customization with Ultimate Team Captains! 

Ready to run the league, one decision at a time? 

#EASPORTSMaddenNFL27 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot
